questions.question: In what 1985 movie did Chevy Chase play an investigative reporter who goes undercover to track the drug trade in his community?
What music countdown show with hosts like Marilyn McCoo and Andy Gibb, featured dancers who wore lycra unitards and slinked through the songs?
In the Men at Work song "Down Under," a man smiled and gave him what to eat?
In 1984, what woman was the first to be listed on a major party ticket for Vice-President?
Finish the 1980's PSA that included eggs and frying pans: "This is your brain. ___________."
